  technical, and hints at tmux.

  What resonates?

[38;5;239m[48;5;237m❯ [38;5;231mMore ideas[39m                                                                    [49m

[38;5;231m⏺[39m [1mAbstract[0m [1m/[0m [1mCool[0m
  - [1mNova[0m — burst of energy, many stars
  - [1mApex[0m — top of the game
  - [1mDrift[0m — sessions flowing in parallel
  - [1mArc[0m — arcs of work converging
  - [1mOnyx[0m — dark, sleek, terminal vibes

  [1mAgent-Oriented[0m
  - [1mColony[0m — agents in a colony
  - [1mQuorum[0m — enough agents to get things done
  - [1mSyndicate[0m — organized group working together
  - [1mLegion[0m — army of coding agents
  - [1mPack[0m — tight group, working as one

  [1mDeveloper[0m [1m/[0m [1mHacker[0m
  - [1mTurbo[0m — speed, parallel power
  - [1mWarp[0m — warp-speed development
  - [1mVolt[0m — electric, energetic
  - [1mBlitz[0m — fast, aggressive execution
  - [1mNitro[0m — raw acceleration

  [1mMetaphor[0m
  - [1mCanopy[0m — umbrella over all your sessions
  - [1mNexus[0m — the connection point
  - [1mPrism[0m — one input, many outputs
  - [1mLattice[0m — interconnected grid of work
  - [1mCortex[0m — the brain managing it all

  [1mMinimal[0m [1m/[0m [1mOne-Syllable[0m
  - [1mRig[0m — your coding rig
  - [1mDock[0m — where sessions dock
  - [1mMesh[0m — networked agents
  - [1mRack[0m — rack of running sessions
  - [1mDen[0m — your command center

  Top picks from this batch: [1mCortex[0m, [1mPrism[0m, [1mWarp[0m, and [1mDen[0m.

  [38;5;153m/remote-control[39m is active. Code in CLI or at
  https://claude.ai/code/session_01MCXiU6ppNMCTdgJg9AVve5

  [38;5;153m/remote-control[39m is active. Code in CLI or at
  https://claude.ai/code/session_014rDVhcLoFec4BU7Ny6LQ19
  [38;5;246m⎿[39m [38;5;246mPlease[39m [38;5;246mupgrade[39m [38;5;246mto[39m [38;5;246mthe[39m [38;5;246mlatest[39m [38;5;246mversion[39m [38;5;246mof[39m [38;5;246mthe[39m [38;5;246mClaude[39m [38;5;246mmobile[39m [38;5;246mapp[39m [38;5;246mto[39m [38;5;246msee[39m [38;5;246myour[39m [38;5;246mRemote[39m [38;5;246mControl[39m [38;5;246msessions.[39m

[39m❯ [7m [0m
[38;5;244m──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
[39m  [36m󰧑[39m [36mOpus[39m [36m4.6[39m [36m(1M[39m [36mcontext)[38;5;246m [90m│[38;5;246m [32m░░░░░░░░░░[38;5;246m [90m│[38;5;246m [32m2%[38;5;246m [90m│[38;5;246m [35m󰍛[39m [35m20.0k/1000k[38;5;246m [90m│[38;5;246m [33m[39m [33mfix/last-used-tracking[38;5;246m [90m│[38;5;246m [1m[37m[0m  [1m[37mbrizz-code[0m
  [38;5;246mPR[39m [38;5;220m#36[39m
